description: Multiple stack-based buffer overflows in the SignKorea SKCrypAX ActiveX control module 5.4.1.2 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a long string in unspecified arguments to the (1) DownloadCert, (2) DecryptFileByKey, and (3) EncryptFileByKey functions, a different module and vectors than CVE-2007-1722.  NOTE: the provenance of this information is unknown; the details are obtained solely from third party information.
Claude Reasoning: CPE identifies SignKorea SKCrypAX ActiveX control — a Korean digital signature cryptographic browser plugin for online banking and government services. Not a doorbell.

description: Buffer overflow in the DownloadCertificateExt function in SignKorea SKCommAX ActiveX control module 7.2.0.2 and 3280 6.6.0.1 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a long pszUserID argument.
Claude Reasoning: CPE identifies SignKorea SKCommAX ActiveX control — a digital certificate management browser plugin. Not a doorbell.

description: Improper access control vulnerability in Hot Pepper Gourmet App for Android ver.4.111.0 and earlier, and for iOS ver.4.111.0 and earlier allows a remote attacker to lead a user to access an arbitrary website via the vulnerable App.
Claude Reasoning: CPE identifies the Hot Pepper Gourmet Android/iOS app — a Japanese restaurant review and food discovery application. Not a doorbell.

description: COMMAX Biometric Access Control System 1.0.0 contains an unauthenticated reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in cookie parameters 'CMX_ADMIN_NM' and 'CMX_COMPLEX_NM'. Attackers can inject malicious HTML and JavaScript code into these cookie values to execute arbitrary scripts in a victim's browser session.
Claude Reasoning: Description names COMMAX Biometric Access Control System 1.0.0 — a commercial enterprise biometric access panel. COMMAX makes residential doorbells, but this product is an enterprise access control system, not a home doorbell.

description: COMMAX CVD-Axx DVR 5.1.4 contains weak default administrative credentials that allow remote password attacks and disclose RTSP stream. Attackers can exploit this by sending a POST request with the 'passkey' parameter set to '1234', allowing them to access the web control panel.
Claude Reasoning: Description names COMMAX CVD-Axx DVR — a commercial digital video recorder system for security surveillance. Not a home doorbell, despite COMMAX also making doorbells.

description: COMMAX UMS Client ActiveX Control 1.7.0.2 contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows attackers to execute arbitrary code by providing excessively long string arrays through multiple functions. Attackers can exploit improper boundary validation in CNC_Ctrl.dll to cause heap corruption and potentially gain system-level access.
Claude Reasoning: Description names COMMAX UMS Client ActiveX Control — a unified messaging system client software component. Not a doorbell or home IoT device.
